name: ai-content-agents
description: Three AI agents for content research, writing, and operations

agents.name: content-researcher
agents.description: Research agent — multi-platform news search, trend analysis, deep research, and content benchmarking

agents.name: content-writer
agents.description: Writing agent — long-form articles, short posts, visual content, slide decks, and infographics

agents.name: content-operator
agents.description: Operations agent — growth planning, audience management, publishing, and content utilities
